title: The Son
content:
Mother, don't hold me,
    Mother, your caress hurts me,
    See through my face,
    How I glow and wane.
    Give the last kiss.    Let me go.
    Send a prayer after me.
    That I broke your life,
    Mother, forgive me.
meaning:
Alfred Lichtenstein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Son"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
